description_long: This is a handheld electric drill with a robust, industrial design, featuring a dark metallic and plastic body. The main housing is rectangular with rounded edges, and it has a prominent pistol-grip handle with a visible trigger for operation. The front section includes a cylindrical chuck holding a twist drill bit, and the body displays several small ventilation holes for cooling. There are metallic and plastic components, with the handle and rear casing likely made of textured plastic for grip, while the front and chuck are metallic. The drill is compact, with a sturdy build suitable for heavy-duty urban or workshop use. The overall color scheme is dark gray and black, with some reddish-brown accent panels.
description: A compact, dark gray and black electric drill with a pistol-grip handle, metallic chuck, and visible ventilation holes. It features a twist drill bit and a robust, industrial design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the drill, including the handle, trigger, main body, and the attached twist drill bit.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular chuck and the tip of the drill bit, with the handle mostly hidden behind the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the handle, trigger, and main body, but from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the handle and the alignment of the drill bit, with the body and trigger partially visible.
